## 🔧 Installation Methods

### Method 1: Automatic (Recommended)
```powershell
git clone https://github.com/GredesCerber/presentation-master.git
cd presentation-master
.\install.ps1
```

### Method 2: Manual
1. Clone repository
2. Copy all files to `%APPDATA%\Code\User\prompts\`
3. Reload VS Code

## 🎯 What Works Now

1. ✅ **Presentation Generation**
   - Topic + authors → 2 HTML files
   - 14-22 slides automatic
   - Quality checklist included

2. ✅ **Self-Improvement**
   - Analyzes after generation
   - Suggests Type A/B/C improvements
   - User approval workflow

3. ✅ **Version Control**
   - Git tracking enabled
   - Improvement history logged
   - Rollback capability

4. ✅ **Portability**
   - Works on any Windows machine
   - Git clone + script = ready
   - Survives Windows reinstall

---

## 🚀 Next Steps (For Users)

1. Run `.\install.ps1` to set up
2. Reload VS Code
3. Find "presentation-master" in agent dropdown
4. Create your first presentation!
